contract_meta.prerequisite_phase: Phase 19 G2 (Trust Spine) and Phase 20 (LangGraph Executions Endpoint)
contract_meta.enhancement: Replace the stubbed LangGraph implementation with the feature-flagged runtime backed by StepQueue parity
contract_meta.rationale: Phase 19 cannot close Gate G3 until the LangGraph runtime actually orchestrates executions behind the AGENTS_RUNTIME feature flag; this phase wires the real graph, ensures store updates, and proves parity with the existing StepQueue pipeline while respecting rollback safety.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Deliver a LangGraph-backed execution path behind AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph that updates the executions store and preserves deterministic StepQueue parity.
project.scope: Update orchestrator graph runtime, server wiring, and package dependencies so LangGraph runs for flagged executions while maintaining existing API behavior.
out_of_scope: New workflow nodes beyond StepQueue parity

execution_model.description: Validate prerequisites from Phase 20, then implement LangGraph runtime updates with incremental testing and evidence capture after each win.

constraints: New dependencies require justification and lockfile update

tasks.title: Verify executions store and StepQueue parity artifacts
tasks.description: Confirm Phase 20 executions store endpoints and StepQueue workflow remain healthy before enabling LangGraph runtime.
actions: Inspect GET /api/executions/:id handler to confirm completion polling remains unchanged
Check StepQueue implementation in src/orchestrator/stepQueue.ts for deterministic options
success_criteria: No regressions detected prior to runtime swap

tasks.title: Install LangGraph runtime dependencies and update package metadata
tasks.description: Add @langchain/langgraph and @langchain/core packages with justification, ensuring lockfile alignment and no forbidden deps.
actions: Document dependency rationale in commit message and evidence notes
success_criteria: Dependencies added to package.json with exact versions

tasks.title: Replace orchestrator stub with LangGraph runner
tasks.description: Update src/orchestrator/graph.ts to compile a StateGraph that invokes the existing StepQueue workflow and writes execution status transitions.
actions: Replace runGraph stub with runWithLangGraph implementation from plan
success_criteria: Execution store transitions written via update/complete/fail helpers

tasks.title: Wire /api/execute flag path to LangGraph runtime
tasks.description: Update src/server.ts to import runWithLangGraph, persist execution state, and fire-and-forget LangGraph execution when AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph.
actions: Add runWithLangGraph import next to buildExecutionId
Replace useLangGraph branch with execution creation and async LangGraph invocation
success_criteria: POST /api/execute returns 202 with executionId when flag enabled
Execution store records started → running → completed transitions
Fallback StepQueue path untouched when flag disabled

tasks.title: Run tests and capture LangGraph parity evidence
tasks.description: Execute automated tests under AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph and gather logs showing execution lifecycle transitions.
actions: Capture console log snippet showing runtime selection
success_criteria: LangGraph execution completes successfully in tests
Evidence artifacts recorded for G3 gate

discovery_first.notes: Reuse discovery artifacts from plan and verify prerequisites before code changes

win_isolation.notes: Complete each task and validations before moving to the next

evidence_backed.notes: No task marked complete without stored evidence references

gate_enforcement.notes: G3 cannot be closed until all tasks validated

fallback_policies.runtime: Unset AGENTS_RUNTIME or set to stepqueue to revert to legacy execution path
fallback_policies.telemetry: Disable OTEL_ENABLED to eliminate tracing overhead during rollback

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: Log runtime selection and execution transitions for every flagged run.
ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Do not mix StepQueue and LangGraph code changes in the same commit.
ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Run targeted execute tests after each major edit.
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: If LangGraph execution fails, halt and inspect execution store entries before retrying.
ai_executor_guidelines.gate_enforcement: Document evidence for G3 prior to requesting closure.
